text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, Sweep Tosho and I take a small
detour on the way home...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey! Look over there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Sweep Tosho's gaze to a large Siberian
husky lying in front of a rice field.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
He looks fairly old, yet dignified like a
wolf—albeit one wearing a collar.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Right?! His fur is so beautiful, and his eyes are
such a deep color...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That settles it! I'm making him my familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That unusual appearance says a lot about him. He
was sent here by a sage to protect this land a
long time ago!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Let's take him back to the dorm! First thing I'll do
is give him a bath!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The dog clearly belongs to someone else, but
Sweep Tosho is quite enamored with it. I need to
put a stop to this without ruining it for her...
choice_data_list:
Don't you think your other familiars might get
jealous?

Why don't we think about it more after talking
to him?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho already has a lot of stuffed animal
familiars. Hopefully I can use her affection toward
them to distract her.
choice_data_list: Why don't we see how they feel first?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Um, excuse me, but...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm the master here. I make the decisions!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter if the others feel jealous, so long
as—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ah.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph.
Oh, I get it.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You just want all my commands to be for you,
don't you? That's why you don't want any more
familiars!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I forgot I'm considered one of her
familiars too.
choice_data_list: Maybe I am feeling a bit lonely...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I figured as much!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Really! What am I gonna do with you?! Talking
back just 'cause you're lonely... Can you even call
yourself a real familiar?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But I guess it'd be a pain if my familiars started
fighting! I'll give up on this one for you, so you
better be grateful!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
In exchange, I want you to be my legs! Gimme a
piggyback ride!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Don't look so surprised! I just lost my chance to
ride a huge dog because of you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Now, crouch down!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hold on! You're too shaky, I'm starting to feel
sick! Let me down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In exchange for giving up the dog, I do my best
to fulfill my role as her familiar as we head home.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then I'll bring him back for sure! I'm really
good at convincing people!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch Sweep Tosho's attempt at persuasion with
my heart racing anxiously.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, doggy! I've got some great news for you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna let you be my familiar! How does that
sound?! Pretty awesome, right?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Are you ignoring me?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What the heck?! You get to work for me! Aren't
you happy?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Say something at least! I'll take a woof or even a
meow!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...
Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The dog suddenly looks behind him. There's a
Shiba Inu slowly approaching that looks even
older than he is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
He silently watches the dog's shaky steps. It must
live in the same neighborhood.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yeah, never mind! I don't need him anyway!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I said I don't need him, didn't I?! Besides! If you
get a good look at him, he's all wrinkly!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
He can just play around with his friend forever for
all I care!
choice_data_list: That'd be nice if they did, huh?
That'd be nice if they did, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Like I care. They can do whatever they want!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whatever she says, Sweep Tosho gives a warm
smile and walks away looking content.
